system: MFSA Connect Design System — Master Composite Reference
framework: Next.js 15 + Tailwind CSS v4 + Radix UI + shadcn/sera
font_loading: next/font/google (Roboto for sans+heading, JetBrains Mono for mono, Roboto Mono for geist-mono)

design_philosophy.border_radius: Zero border-radius (rounded-none) on ALL components — the single most distinctive visual characteristic. Only exceptions: Avatar (rounded-full) and chart indicator dots (rounded-[2px]).
design_philosophy.typography_approach: Uppercase + tracking-wider for ALL label-level text: buttons, badges, dropdown items, table headers, form labels, tabs, sidebar labels, toggle text.
design_philosophy.input_style: Underline-style inputs — only bottom border visible (border border-transparent border-b-input). Focus reveals bottom border color change to ring color.
design_philosophy.elevation: Flat-with-shadow. Cards get shadow-sm + ring-1. Floating UI gets shadow-md + ring-1. No heavy box-shadows or extreme depth.
design_philosophy.spacing_density: Moderate-to-low density. Generous card padding (py-8 px-8). Comfortable grid gaps (gap-4 to gap-6). Dashboard uses p-6, sections use py-24.
design_philosophy.animation: Minimal, fast (100-200ms), purposeful. No decorative animations, no parallax, no scroll-triggered reveals. Every animation serves a functional purpose.
design_philosophy.color_contrast: Moderate-to-high contrast. Primary is vivid #0052ff. Text uses near-black #0a0b0d on white. Muted foreground at #7c828a for secondary content.
design_philosophy.component_variant_system: CVA (class-variance-authority) for all variant-driven components: Button, Text, Badge, Toggle, TabsList, Alert.

color_tokens.definition_location: src/app/globals.css @theme inline directive + :root/.dark CSS custom properties
color_tokens.dark_mode_strategy: Inverted luminance for backgrounds/foregrounds. Saturated colors (primary, destructive, semantic-up/down, accent-yellow) remain identical across modes.

architecture_overview.project_type: Next.js 15 App Router with client-side rendering (all 'use client' pages)
architecture_overview.api_layer: src/proxy.ts for API client configuration + src/features/ with feature-based API modules
architecture_overview.state_management: React Query (QueryProvider) for server state + React Context (ThemeProvider, AuthProvider, SidebarProvider) for client state
architecture_overview.styling_approach: Tailwind CSS v4 via @import + CSS custom properties for theme tokens + CVA for component variants + cn() utility for class merging
architecture_overview.component_hierarchy: ThemeProvider → TooltipProvider → QueryProvider → AuthProvider → Redirect → children
architecture_overview.page_composition: layout.tsx sets providers → page.tsx composes shared components → features/ handles business logic
architecture_overview.sidebar_pattern: SidebarProvider → AppSidebar + SidebarInset (with header + content area)
architecture_overview.data_table_pattern: Page header → DataTableFilters → DataTable → DataTablePagination (repeated across 8+ feature pages)

file_manifest.description: Complete list of generated design system documentation files

files.purpose: Complete color system: core semantic, extended, sidebar, chart, indicator tokens with HEX/OKLCH values, light/dark variants, and purpose descriptions
Complete typography scale: 14 Text component CVA variants, 3 font families, 30+ component-level text conventions, and typography philosophy
Spacing conventions: dominant units, padding/gap/height conventions, border-radius philosophy, responsive behavior, and whitespace density
Elevation and depth: card shadows, floating UI shadows, overlay system, z-index layers, blur usage, and depth hierarchy
Animation and motion: transition timings, easing curves, component-specific enter/exit animations, hover/focus animations, loading states
30+ component specifications: variant tables, sizing, states, text styles, and repeated class combinations for copy-paste reuse
Layout and page structure: page width strategy, grid systems, dashboard layout, sidebar navigation, data table page pattern, spacing conventions
UX interaction patterns: feedback states (loading, empty, error, success), navigation, data entry, confirmation, notifications
Dark mode strategy: theme provider mechanics, color inversion rules, component-specific adjustments, contrast handling, sidebar adaptation
Mobile framework mapping: tokens translated to React Native (NativeWind, Tamagui, Expo), component mapping, platform considerations
UI architecture: component tree, provider hierarchy, folder structure, file organization conventions, import patterns, page composition

design_system_distinctives.most_distinctive_visual_characteristic: Zero border-radius (rounded-none) on ALL UI components
design_system_distinctives.most_defining_text_pattern: Uppercase + tracking-wider on every button, badge, label, table header, tab, dropdown item, sidebar label, and toggle
design_system_distinctives.input_signature: Bottom-border-only inputs (underline style) with transparent top/right/left borders
design_system_distinctives.elevation_signature: shadow-sm + ring-1 for cards, shadow-md + ring-1 for floating UI
design_system_distinctives.color_signature: Vivid blue (#0052ff) primary with moderate-contrast neutrals and white backgrounds
design_system_distinctives.animation_signature: 100ms fade+zoom for all floating UI, 200ms slide for sheets, 200ms linear for sidebar collapse
design_system_distinctives.responsive_signature: Container queries (@container) for card-level adaptation alongside Tailwind breakpoints
design_system_distinctives.icon_signature: HugeIcons library (hugeicons) as primary icon set, supplemented by lucide-react and radix-ui icons
